published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2010 and Makarov1981: fixed-threshold DTE bounds from known marginals

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3.1 only has ManskiNonparametricBounds_Study selected-cell mean bounds, not DTE path OT

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019 finite-vector sharpness with fixed marginals; FanGuerreZhu2017 covariate functionals; FanPassShi2025 support-function OT

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Fan and Wu 2010 ReStud on partial identification of the distribution of treatment effects in switching-regime/conditional settings, a closer conditional-DTE comparator than several cited OT papers.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Lee2024 is used as a flagship comparator without a section, equation, page, or quoted gap anchoring the specific pathwise one-coupling claim.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Mullahy2023 is cited as the count-outcome consumer, but the §8 claim gives no location-level anchor tying count-valued DTE bounds to the proposed G^eta_P(D) diagnostic.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The only concrete witness is the eta=1 singleton-marginal fixed-support corner, which collapses to the known Firpo-Ridder/Fan-Park setting rather than exhibiting the promised marginal-overlap-envelope regime.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; to clear flagship, the kernel needs an explicitly anchored strict extension beyond FanGuerreZhu2017/FanWu2010/FanPassShi2025, not just a routine support-function/Aumann-integral specialization.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a non-corner finite-support witness with non-singleton marginal envelopes and a binding overlap-support restriction, then compute the separating direction v and G^eta_P(D) explicitly.

Add Fan and Wu 2010 and a location-anchored FanGuerreZhu2017 comparison, then phrase Conjecture 1 as a strict extension of their conditional/functionals result with the exact assumption they do not allow.
Promote Conjecture 2 from a diagnostic definition to a constructive algorithmic result with input format, finite dictionary construction, and a complexity or termination bound.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature frontier and add a genuine overlap-envelope witness before sending this back for flagship review.
